subject: C2: Build scripts/audit_rules.py drift checker
description: Static analyzer that: (1) greps all _fire("...") calls in inventory_forecaster.py with line numbers, (2) cross-references RULES.md table entries, (3) reports any rule code in code-but-not-docs or docs-but-not-code, (4) lists rules with no narrative driver string. Exit code 1 if drift found. Can be wired into pre-commit later.
